verses.text: Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Pasal khatpeuh, a natui a paikhiat ciangin tua a paikhia a natui pen a nin ahi hi
Amah a ninsak a natui paikhia tawh kisai-in ngeina hih bang ahi hi: A natui a paipai a, a khawl zongin, ama sungah nitna mah hi veve hi
A natui a paikhia mipa' lupna leh a tutna peuhmah a nin hi ding hi
Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A natui a paikhia mipa' tutnasa na khat peuhpeuh tungah a tu mi peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A natui a paikhia mipa' pumpi a lawng mi peuhmah in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A natui a paikhia mipa in a siang mipa' tungah cil a siat leh, tuapa in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A natui a paikhia mipa a tutna tutphah khat peuhpeuh zong a nin hi ding hi
Ama nuai-ah a om na khat peuhpeuh a lawng mipa pen a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi. Tua bang na a pua mipa in a puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A natui a paikhia mipa in tui sungah a khut sillopi-in a lawn' mi peuhmah in ama puante sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A natui a paikhia mipa in a lawn' lei tawh kibawl umlebeelte kisukham ding a, sing tawh kibawl kuanglekeute ahih leh tui sungah kisawp ding hi
“A natui a paikhia mipa a natui a kan ciangin a kisian'sakna dingin amah in ni sagih sung ngak ding a, tua ciangin a puante sawpin, tuiluang sungah a pumpi sil ding a, a siang hi ding hi
A ni giat ni-in amah in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhuno nih la-in, Topa' mai kikhopna bukkongah pai-in, siampipa tungah tuate pia ding hi
Siampipa in tuate, khat khialhna hanga biakna ding leh adang khat meihal biakna dingin pia ding a, a natui a paikhia mipa-a' dingin siampipa in Topa' mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi
“Mi khat in a natui a teh leh, amah in a pumpi khempeuh tui sungah sil ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
A tungah a natui a tukna puan leh savun peuhmah tui tawh kisawp ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
Pasal leh numei a lupkhawm khit ciangin, amaute gel tui sungah kisil ding uh a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding uh hi
“Numei khat in nin a neih ciangin, ni sagih sung a ninin om ding a, amah a lawng mi peuhmah a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
Amah a nit hun sungin a lupna leh a tutna peuhpeuh a nin hi ding hi
Ama lupna a lawng peuhmah in a puan sawp ding a, amahmah tui sungah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
Ama tutna a lawng peuhmah in ama puante sawp ding a, tui sungah amahmah kisilin, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
Ama tutna ahi lupna hita leh na khat peuhpeuh hita leh, mi khat in a lawn' ciangin a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
Pasal khat peuhmah tuanu tawh lumin, tuanu' nitna ama tungah a om leh, ni sagih sung tuapa a nin hi ding a, tuapa' lupna peuhmah zong a nin hi ding hi
“Numei khat in ama nit hun hilo napi-in ni tampi sung a si a suak ahi a, ama nit hun sung khengin nin nei-in ahi zongin a om leh, a ninneih sung khempeuh, ama nit hun sung mah bangin a nin hi ding hi
Ama ninneih hun sungtengin a tutna khempeuh zong a nit sungin ama lupna tawh kibang ding a, amah a nin ahih mah bangin a tutna khempeuh zong a nin hi ding hi
Hih nate a lawng peuhmah a nin hi ding a, a puante sawpin, amahmah tui sungah kisil ding a, a nitak mateng a nin hi ding hi
Ahih hangin tuanu a nin a bei zawh ni sagih khit ciangin a siang hi ding hi
A ni giat ni-in tuanu in vakhu nih ahih kei leh kawl vakhuno nih la-in, kikhopna bukkong, siampipa kiangah tuate paipih ding hi
Siampipa in khialhna hanga biakna dingin khat pia-in, meihal biakna dingin adang khat pia ding hi. Siampipa in ama nitna hangin Topa' mai-ah ama-a' ding kilemna bawlsak ding hi
“Amau' laizanga om ka biakbuk ninsakkha le uh amaute in sihlawh ding uh ahih ciangin, tua bangin note in Israel mite amau' nitna panin siangsakin na kem ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Hih pen a natui a paikhia mipa ahih kei leh a natui tehin, tua tawh mi nin a suakpa-a' dingin ngeina hi a
nin a neinu-a' ding zong ahi hi. Hihte pen pasal a natui a paikhia mi, ninnei numei leh, a nin neih sungin numei tawh a lumkhawm mipa-a' dingin ngeina ahi hi.
